experience.title: Art Director
responsibilities: Led a team of artists to develop visual concepts for local art shows.
Managed the budget for art supplies and exhibition costs.
Collaborated with local artists to coordinate community art projects.
Oversaw the installation and arrangement of artwork in various galleries.
Presented art pieces to stakeholders and community members.

experience.title: Graphic Designer
responsibilities: Created digital and print designs for client branding projects.
Developed marketing materials including brochures and flyers.
Worked closely with clients to understand their vision and deliver tailored designs.
Utilized Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) to execute design projects.
Maintained project timelines and delivered work within deadlines.

response.summary: Creative professional with extensive experience in art direction and graphic design. Proven ability to lead teams and manage projects, with a strong focus on visual storytelling and community engagement.
